title: Develop export markets for produce
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop export markets for produce demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Evaluate export potential

pcs.text: Identify competitive advantages and disadvantages for the proposed product, in respect to the product's entry to overseas markets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify competitive advantages and disadvantages for the proposed product, in respect to the product's entry to overseas markets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify competitive advantages and disadvantages for the proposed product, in respect to the product's entry to overseas markets.

pcs.text: Analyse features of potential markets in respect to cultural factors, quality requirements, government regulations and other economic, political and social factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse features of potential markets in respect to cultural factors, quality requirements, government regulations and other economic, political and social factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse features of potential markets in respect to cultural factors, quality requirements, government regulations and other economic, political and social factors.

pcs.text: Analyse business resources for their appropriateness and capacity to contribute to the marketing effort
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse business resources for their appropriateness and capacity to contribute to the marketing effort?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse business resources for their appropriateness and capacity to contribute to the marketing effort.

pcs.text: Identify available capital and time for the development of the export plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify available capital and time for the development of the export plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify available capital and time for the development of the export plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Evaluate export potential

elements.title: Develop export strategy

pcs.text: Conduct customer analysis and define the market niche
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct customer analysis and define the market niche?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct customer analysis and define the market niche.

pcs.text: Develop operational plan to address the market mix
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop operational plan to address the market mix?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop operational plan to address the market mix.

pcs.text: Prepare budgets to address the investment required in the operational plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare budgets to address the investment required in the operational plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare budgets to address the investment required in the operational plan.

pcs.text: Plan strategies that target the identified market and initiate negotiations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan strategies that target the identified market and initiate negotiations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan strategies that target the identified market and initiate negotiations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop export strategy

elements.title: Plan for implementation

pcs.text: Identify and address steps in an export transaction

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and address steps in an export transaction.

pcs.text: Identify and prepare documentation requirements for export
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare documentation requirements for export?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare documentation requirements for export.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Plan for implementation
